_status: placeholder - not real data, see equipment-data/README.txt and ISSUES.md ISS-3. Reshaped 2026-07-13 (capexiq-prebuild-assurance PBA-2) so every field matches the same nested-object schema used by mri/ct/cath-lab/dialysis/ultrasound.json -- previously several fields here were bare `null` instead of a `{value/low/typical/high, unit, confidence, sourceId}` object, which would throw a TypeError the first time generic tooltip/default-population code (built against the other 5 files) reads Custom equipment's data. Every value stays null (Custom equipment has no researchable benchmark by definition); only the shape changed. Also removed `financingNorms` and `typicalUtilization.workingDaysPerMonth`, which ISS-13 (resolved 2026-07-11) already removed from the other 5 equipment files as dead schema duplicating common-assumptions.json -- this file was the one ISS-13's own cleanup didn't reach.

amcAnnualCostPercentage.unit: percent of equipment cost per year

cmcAnnualCostPercentage.unit: percent of equipment cost per year
